title: Figure 1 in Taxonomy, phylogeny and biogeography of Politolana Bruce, 1981 (Crustacea: Isopoda: Cirolanidae)
author: Riseman, Sarah F.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure 1. Five equally most parsimonious trees resulting from branch-and-bound search, PAUP version 3.1. For all five trees, length = 158 steps, CI = 0.65, RI = 0.65, RC = 0.43. With six uninformative characters removed, length = 151 steps, CI = 0.63, RC = 0.41.
steps_raw: Figure 1. Five equally most parsimonious trees resulting from branch-and-bound search, PAUP version 3.1. For all five trees, length = 158 steps, CI = 0.65, RI = 0.65, RC = 0.43. With six uninformative characters removed, length = 151 steps, CI = 0.63, RC = 0.41.
